scripts.deploy:cloud: npm run build:cloud && firebase deploy --only hosting --project fitness-aos
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build:cloud && firebase hosting:channel:deploy preview --expires 24h
scripts.deploy:prev: npm run build:cloud && firebase hosting:channel:deploy preview --expires 24h
scripts.build:preview: npm run build:cloud && firebase hosting:channel:deploy preview --expires 24h
scripts.build:prev: npm run build:cloud && firebase hosting:channel:deploy preview --expires 24h
